records.question: Which people have the name Hubert Henno and were born on 06.10.1976?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
WHERE people.name = 'Hubert Henno' AND people.date_of_birth = '06.10.1976'
records.pred_sql: SELECT People_ID FROM people WHERE Name = 'Hubert Henno' AND Date_of_Birth = '06.10.1976'

records.question: Who in the people table has a height that is exactly 196.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
WHERE people.height = 196.0
records.pred_sql: SELECT People_ID FROM people WHERE Height = 196.0

records.question: Which men who are no more than 188.0 cm tall and weigh at most 83.0 have a support rate of at most 0.25 in the WNBC/Marist Poll?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN candidate ON people.people_id = candidate.people_id
WHERE people.sex = 'M' AND people.weight <= 83.0 AND candidate.support_rate <= 0.25 AND candidate.poll_source = 'WNBC/Marist Poll' AND people.height <= 188.0
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.People_ID
FROM people p
JOIN candidate c ON p.People_ID = c.People_ID
WHERE p.Sex = 'M'
AND p.Height <= 188.0
AND p.Weight <= 83.0
AND c.Support_rate <= 0.25
AND c.Poll_Source = 'WNBC/Marist Poll'

SELECT people.people_id FROM people

records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT people.People_ID
FROM people
JOIN candidate ON people.People_ID = candidate.People_ID
WHERE candidate.Consider_rate <= 0.34

records.question: What people born on 06.10.1976 with a weight of exactly 83.0 and height at most 188.0 have candidate data from WNBC/Marist Poll showing a consider rate of at most 0.3, unsure rate no more than 0.2, support rate at least 0.25, and oppose rate at least 0.43?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN candidate ON people.people_id = candidate.people_id
WHERE people.weight = 83.0 AND people.date_of_birth = '06.10.1976' AND candidate.consider_rate <= 0.3 AND candidate.poll_source = 'WNBC/Marist Poll' AND people.height <= 188.0 AND candidate.unsure_rate <= 0.2 AND candidate.support_rate >= 0.25 AND candidate.oppose_rate >= 0.43
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.People_ID
FROM people p
JOIN candidate c ON p.People_ID = c.People_ID
WHERE p.Date_of_Birth = '06.10.1976'
AND p.Weight = 83.0
AND p.Height <= 188.0
AND c.Poll_Source = 'WNBC/Marist Poll'
AND c.Consider_rate <= 0.3
AND c.Unsure_rate <= 0.2
AND c.Support_rate >= 0.25
AND c.Oppose_rate >= 0.43

records.question: Who is Laurent Capet with a weight of 92.0 where the FOX News/Opinion Dynamics Poll shows a support rate of 0.18, oppose rate of at least 0.44, unsure rate of at most 0.3, and consider rate of at most 0.34?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT people.people_id FROM people
JOIN candidate ON people.people_id = candidate.people_id
WHERE candidate.unsure_rate <= 0.3 AND candidate.poll_source = 'FOX News/Opinion Dynamics Poll' AND people.weight = 92.0 AND candidate.oppose_rate >= 0.44 AND people.name = 'Laurent Capet' AND candidate.support_rate = 0.18 AND candidate.consider_rate <= 0.34
records.pred_sql:
SELECT p.People_ID
FROM people p
JOIN candidate c ON p.People_ID = c.People_ID
WHERE p.Name = 'Laurent Capet'

AND c.Poll_Source = 'FOX News/Opinion Dynamics'
AND c.Support_rate = 0.18
AND c.Oppose_rate >= 0.44
AND c.Unsure_rate <= 0.3
AND c.Consider_rate <= 0.34
